messages.content: STEP_OK

[T1b tool-help-detail] Call execute-tool with toolName='tool-help', instanceId='hermes', input={'toolName':'generate_image'}. Check that the result contains a name, a description, and a parameters schema. End your reply with STEP_OK if all three were present, or FAILED: <what was missing> if anything was wrong.

{"currentEnv":"development","currentPlatform":"ai","hint":"Call as: execute-tool toolName=\"generate_image\". CLI: vibe generate_image [--field=value].","matchedCount":1,"tools":[{"category":"AI","description":"Generate an image from a text prompt using AI","examples":{"inputs":{"default":{"model":"gpt-5-image","prompt":"A photorealistic sunset over a mountain lake","quality":"post.quality.standard","size":"post.size.square1024"}},"responses":{"default":{"creditCost":4,"imageUrl":"https://example.com/generated-image.png"}}},"name":"generate_image","parameters":{"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","properties":{"aspectRatio":{"description":"Output image aspect ratio","type":"string"},"model":{"description":"Select an image generation model","enum":["flux-pro","flux-2-max","flux-2-klein-4b","riverflow-v2-pro","riverflow-v2-fast","riverflow-v2-max-preview","riverflow-v2-standard-preview","riverflow-v2-fast-preview","flux-2-flex","flux-2-pro","seedream-4.5","gen4-t2i-turbo","gen4-image","wan-2.7-t2i","grok-t2i","z-image-base","z-image-turbo","flux-pro-1.1-ultra","imagen-4-ultra","imagen-4","imagen-4-fast","qwen-t2i","realtime-t2i","gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview","gemini-3-pro-image-preview","gpt-5-image-mini","gpt-5-image","gpt-5.4-image-2"],"type":"string"},"prompt":{"description":"Describe the image you want to generate","maxLength":2000,"minLength":1,"type":"string"},"quality":{"default":"post.quality.standard","description":"Select output image quality","enum":["post.quality.standard","post.quality.hd"],"type":"string"},"size":{"default":"post.size.square1024","description":"Select output image dimensions","enum":["post.size.square1024","post.size.landscape1792","post.size.portrait1792"],"type":"string"}},"required":["prompt"],"type":"object"},"platforms":["cli","ai","mcp","remote-skill","trpc","next-page","next-api","cron","electron","frame"],"subCategory":"Generation","title":"Generate Image"}],"totalCount":397}

messages.content: STEP_OK
[T3b fork-branch] Say exactly: BRANCH_RESPONSE STEP_OK
BRANCH_RESPONSE STEP_OK

[T4b video-gen] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_video', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'spinning cube'}. Check that the result has a non-empty videoUrl, a positive creditCost, and a positive durationSeconds. End your reply with STEP_OK if everything was correct, or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.

Or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.

[T5a endLoop] Call execute-tool with toolName='tool-help', instanceId='hermes', callbackMode='endLoop'. After receiving the result, try to call execute-tool with toolName='tool-help' and instanceId='hermes' again. Check that only ONE tool-help call was executed (the loop should have stopped) and the result had a non-empty tools array. End your reply with STEP_OK if exactly one call ran and the result was correct, or FAILED: <reason> if the loop continued or the result was wrong.

messages.content: STEP_OK

[T6a wakeUp-phase1] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'wakeup-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. The image will be generated asynchronously. IMPORTANT: In this first phase you should receive a taskId with no imageUrl yet - end your reply with STEP_OK if you see taskId and no imageUrl, or FAILED: <reason> otherwise. ALSO IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the image is ready. When revived (you will see the generate_image tool result containing an imageUrl), confirm the imageUrl is present and non-empty, then end with WAKEUP_OK. If revived but imageUrl is missing or empty, end with WAKEUP_FAILED: <reason>.
{"hint":"Result will be injected into this thread when ready. Do NOT call this tool again.","status":"pending"}
messages.name: execute-tool

messages.content: WAKEUP_OK

[T6c-phase1 wakeUp-failure-setup] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'failure-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. In this first phase you should receive a taskId (no imageUrl yet). End with STEP_OK if you see taskId, or FAILED: <reason>. IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the task completes. When revived, if the result shows status=failed or has no imageUrl, end with WAKEUP_FAILED: <reason>. If imageUrl is present, end with WAKEUP_OK.
{"hint":"Result will be injected into this thread when ready. Do NOT call this tool again.","status":"pending"}
messages.name: execute-tool

{"status":"pending"}

[T7a approve-phase1] In a single response, call BOTH at the same time: (1) execute-tool with toolName='tool-help' and instanceId='hermes' to list available tools, and (2) execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'approve-test'}. The generate_image tool requires user confirmation - it should NOT execute yet. End your reply with STEP_OK after the tool calls.
{"hint":"Waiting for user confirmation before executing.","status":"waiting_for_confirmation"}

messages.content: The async remote task has completed. All tool results from the previous step are now available in the context above.

[T8 parallel-tools] In a single response, call BOTH at the same time: (1) execute-tool with toolName='tool-help', instanceId='hermes', callbackMode='wait' to list available tools, and (2) execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'green square'}, callbackMode='wait'. IMPORTANT: You MUST use callbackMode='wait' for both tools - do NOT use wakeUp or detach. Check that tool-help returned a non-empty tools array and generate_image returned an imageUrl (not a taskId). End your reply with STEP_OK if both tools returned correct results, or FAILED: <reason> if either tool failed or only one ran.

You are a conversation summarizer. Your task is to compress the conversation history above into a compact summary that preserves all essential context for continuing the conversation.

**What to preserve:**
- Key decisions, conclusions, and outcomes reached
- Important facts, data, or values mentioned by the user
- User preferences, constraints, and goals stated
- Significant code, technical details, or instructions (keep verbatim if important)
- The most recent topic/task being worked on
- Results of tool calls and actions taken
- CDN URLs for images, audio, and video - copy these verbatim exactly as they appear (e.g. https://...)

**What to omit:**
- System instructions, skill personas, or role-play framing
- Tool definitions, function signatures, or available-tool descriptions
- Greetings, pleasantries, and filler exchanges
- Redundant or superseded information
- Any content that is only relevant to the system and not to the user conversation

**Format:**
- Write in past tense from a neutral observer perspective
- Group related points together
- Use bullet points for clarity
- Output ONLY the summary - no preamble, no meta-commentary, no section headers like "Summary:"
